zh.lifeSummary: 當John Southwell於大約1507年出生在英國素福爾可巴恩哈姆時，他的父親Sir Robert Southwell48歲，母親Cecilia Sharington23歲。他於1529年與Elizabeth Foster在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1564年在英國素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Southwell于大约1507年出生在英国素福爾可巴恩哈姆时，他的父亲Sir Robert Southwell48岁，母亲Cecilia Sharington23岁。他于1529年与Elizabeth Foster在英国英格兰艾可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1564年在英国素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Southwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English south ‘south’ + wel(le) ‘well, pool, spring’ (Old English sūth + wella). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived ‘by the south well’ or ‘south of the well’, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Southwell (Nottinghamshire) or Southwell on the Isle of Portland (Dorset).
in Yorkshire and Lancashire, often a hypercorrect form of Soothill, a habitational name from Soothill in Dewsbury (Yorkshire), from Old English sōt ‘soot’ + hyll ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When John Southwell was born about 1507, in Barnham, Suffolk, England, his father, Sir Robert Southwell, was 48 and his mother, Cecilia Sharington, was 23. He married Elizabeth Foster in 1529, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1564, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Southwell est né environ 1507, à Barnham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Southwell, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Cecilia Sharington, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Foster en 1529, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1564, à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Southwell um 1507 in Barnham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Southwell 48 und seine Mutter Cecilia Sharington 23. Er hat 1529 in Essex, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Foster geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1564 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Southwell è nato il circa 1507 nel Barnham, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert Southwell, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Cecilia Sharington, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Foster nel 1529, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1564, nel Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Southwellが約1507年にイギリススフォルクバーンハムで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Southwellは48歳，母Cecilia Sharingtonは23歳であった。1529年にイギリスイギリスエセックスでElizabeth Fosterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1564年にイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Southwell(이)가 대략 1507년 영국 수폴크 바른함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Southwell(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecilia Sharington(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1529년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 Elizabeth Foster(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1564년 영국 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Southwell nasceu aproximadamente 1507, em Barnham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Southwell, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Cecilia Sharington, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Foster em 1529, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1564, em Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Southwell родился около 1507 г. в местности барнам, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Southwell было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecilia Sharington, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Foster в 1529 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1564 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Southwell nació aproximadamente 1507, en Barnham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Southwell, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Cecilia Sharington, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Foster en 1529, en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1564, en Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años.
